title: Field Tent — Indigo
summary: Field tent in indigo; built in Japan for daily use.

content.text:
# Field Tent — Indigo

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Field Tent — Indigo is designed for the long haul, with outdoor-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Japan.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":1648,"materials":{"upper":"waxed canvas","sole":"crepe rubber","lining":"cotton twill"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Japan","capacity":"4-person"}
